It is native to the Mediterranean region and is classified as a type of periwinkle, a small shrubby plant with blue-purple flowers. Within the Apocynaceae family, Asterocephalus monspeliensis is classified as belonging to the subfamily Plumerioideae. This subfamily is further divided into several tribes and genera, with Asterocephalus monspeliensis being a member of the tribe Plumerieae. The exact classification of Asterocephalus monspeliensis is still evolving as more research is conducted.
